verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are climbing Jacob’s ladder, We are climbing Jacob’s ladder, We are climbing Jacob’s ladder, Soldiers of the Cross.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Rise, shine give God the glory, Rise, shine give God the glory, Rise, shine give God the glory, Soldiers of the Cross.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every rung goes higher and higher, Every rung goes higher and higher, Every rung goes higher and higher, Soldiers of the Cross.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If you love Him, why not serve Him? If you love Him, why not serve Him? If you love Him why not serve Him? Soldiers of the Cross.
